career_angle: Sandboxed code execution for LLM outputs is a genuine infrastructure gap -- learn container/microVM isolation (Firecracker, gVisor) if you want to be useful in the AI infra hiring wave. Skip the Modal hype, learn the primitives.

dimensions.name: Unknown
dimensions.rationale: Modal's own blog -- vendor marketing channel, not independent reporting or peer review

dimensions.name: Unknown
dimensions.rationale: Case study format means curated metrics only; no failure modes, cost comparisons, or independent benchmarks shared

dimensions.name: Unknown
dimensions.rationale: Poe is a live product, Modal sandboxes are a real API -- you can verify the technical claims yourself

dimensions.rationale: Sandboxing LLM-generated code is an accepted best practice; no controversial claims here

dimensions.rationale: 'Thousands of sandboxes simultaneously' is vague -- no latency numbers, cost per sandbox, failure rates, or comparison to alternatives
